_note: THE LIVING WORLD law profiles (docs/design/LIVING_WORLD_DSOA.md §6). Folded ADDITIVELY onto the code floor in world_state.gd — free_counties_law + faith_occupation_law live in code (the slice depends on them); NEW ids here become real laws. A new law = a ROW.

corporate_corridor_law.name: Corporate Corridor Law
corporate_corridor_law.blurb: Guns legal for licensed security or paying customers. Drones tracked. Debt replaces jail. Clean roads, brutal repossession.

federal_checkpoint_law.name: Federal Remnant Checkpoint Law
federal_checkpoint_law.blurb: Strict IDs and checkpoints. Gun registration enforced. Heavy patrols. Drones illegal near bases.
